{{Quote|We're hit—but by what? The scanners read clear space for a million kilometers around us!|Roak|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
'''Roak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the [[Executive officer/Legends|first officer]] aboard a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Chedaki's blockade runner|blockade runner]] commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Chedaki]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was assigned to take [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to the [[Shiva system/Legends|Shiva system]], in order to investigate suspicious [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activity in the remote region. However, when Organa and Chedaki attempted to scan the inhabited [[Shiva IV]] in the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], they ran into an unseen [[anti-matter bomb]] that [[Death/Legends|killed]] Chedaki and damaged the blockade runner. Roak immediately took charge of the situation, but his efforts to retrieve Organa were hampered by the blast's effect on the shuttle's firing circuits. Instead, Organa crashed her shuttle on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] below, a decision which saved the ship.<ref name="marvel53" />

==Behind the scenes==
Roak appeared in ''[[Star Wars (1977) 53|Star Wars 53: The Last Gift from Alderaan]]'', written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1981]].<ref name="marvel53" />
